commit.subject: LU-19819: utils: enhance 'lctl *_param' usage message
commit.message:
LU-19819: utils: enhance 'lctl *_param' usage message

This commit update help messages to ensure a clean output.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Aurélien Cedeyn <acedeyn@ddn.com>
Change-Id: I43d1a38ece642a79e9783982a959500f89e06ed7
